chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-3596 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 10.04.2025 Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, D.A.G. ------------------------------------ This is an old case of 2014, it was last fixed on 22.09.2017, about 8 years ago. Since then petitioner has not moved any urgent application. None present for petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Gulsher/PS
